summary: Amalgam cavities are prone to cracks and fractures when stressed because they're brittle; thus, not suitable for occlusal margin preparations which experience high force during chewing. \boxed{\text{Brittleness}} This summary captures the essence by highlighting why brittleness specifically poses a problem at occlusal sites without extraneous details.
